raw_consumer_statement:
I had been scammed shortly after sending the {$700.00} via Amex XXXX. I called American Express right away to request a chargeback, but they told me they couldnt help and that XXXX would have to handle it. They also mentioned that it is not considered a scam. XXXX also refused to take action in holding the funds and said they will investigate but they got back to me and said they cant do anything. 

I never received the product ( a cat ) that I paid for. This was a fraudulent transaction and I acted quickly to report it. Im asking for American Express to reconsider this case and help me recover the funds. It was frustrating that the customer service people kept saying it was not a scam and its not fraudulent when it is. Credit card companies should have better protection for consumers as promised.
